dissent_flag.dissent_reason: Technical reads CHOP ribbon (fast < pivot < slow, inverted 24¢ spread) with doji-ish alternating bars — no momentum; internals show zero sector breadth (all sectors sub-0.3%, no leadership), jointly undermining the bullish accumulation narrative.

validator_assessment.weakest_link: Bullish agents treated the inverted ribbon (fast < pivot < slow) as neutral CHOP rather than a structurally bearish stack, borrowing unearned conviction from the no_trade votes; the premarket $2.79 bounce is consistent with vacuum fill, not buyer accumulation.
validator_assessment.top_invalidation_scenario: SPY rolls over from 668.49 resistance and closes below 667.12 support within first 90 minutes of RTH (by ~10:45 ET), proving the premarket bounce was short-covering vacuum fill rather than new buyer accumulation.

primary.condition: if SPY breaks and holds above PMH 668.49 on first or second test with expanding volume

secondary.condition: if SPY rejects at or below PMH 668.49 on open and rolls over with a red bar close below prior bar low

invalidation.condition: SPY closes below 667.12 support within first 90 minutes of RTH (by ~10:45 ET)
invalidation.effect: Proves premarket bounce was vacuum fill — bullish level structure collapses; next flush targets 665.70; no bullish entry warranted until 667.12 is reclaimed.

swarm_predictions.claim: SPY will test PMH resistance at 668.49 within the first 30 minutes of RTH (by 10:00 ET), given price is only $0.03 away at premarket close
swarm_predictions.invalidation: SPY opens below 668.00 and does not touch 668.49 before 10:00 ET

swarm_predictions.claim: VIX remains below 23.50 through 11:00 ET, sustaining the overnight decompression signal and keeping the macro backstop intact for a potential bullish break
swarm_predictions.invalidation: VIX reverses and spikes back above 23.50 by 10:00 ET, signaling fear re-entering the market

swarm_predictions.claim: Ribbon will remain CHOP (spread <30¢, no full bull alignment) through 10:00 ET, preventing a clean ribbon-confirmation entry signal on the first test of 668.49
swarm_predictions.invalidation: Ribbon aligns full bull stack (fast > pivot > slow with spread ≥30¢) within the first 30 minutes of RTH

synthesis_narrative: The core tension is a 2-2 split: macro and level_thesis both read bullish on VIX decompression and a $2.76 premarket bounce consolidating at PMH 668.49, while technical (inverted ribbon, doji bars = CHOP) and internals (zero sector breadth, all sub-0.3%) see no directional conviction. The weighted bullish edge (0.55) is moderate at best, and FOMC tomorrow adds gamma-risk context that keeps today clean but tomorrow uncertain. The single most important watch at open: whether SPY can print a clean bar close above 668.49 on meaningful volume — a confirmed break opens 672.07, but a rejection at PMH with follow-through below 667.12 flips the tape to a bearish flush and invalidates the swarm's primary scenario.

technical.one_line: CHOP ribbon (fast < pivot < slow, 24¢ spread) + alternating doji bars — no momentum direction, wait for structure

macro.one_line: VIX HIGH regime but falling -6.33% (decompression) + zero events today + pre-market buying interest = risk-on lean

level_thesis.one_line: Battle level PMH 668.49 at $0.03 overhead; steady premarket uptrend from 665.70 suggests accumulation; break opens 672.07

internals.one_line: All sectors sub-0.3%, flat breadth, zero rotation or leadership — insufficient internals signal for directional conviction

validator.top_invalidation: Inverted ribbon is structurally bearish (not neutral CHOP); premarket bounce is vacuum fill; flat internals signal trapped longs not new buyers
